rulings.Case Title: ANDREW JUSTICE et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al

Defendant Hill Brothers Chemical Co.¿s joinder to The Sherwin-Williams Co. and Kelly-Moore Paint Co., Inc.¿s motion for protective order and sanctions is off calendar as moot based on the ruling on the underlying motion. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW JUSTICE et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Protective Order And Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, October 18, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendants The Sherwin-Williams Company and Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.¿s motion for protective order requesting defendant with 30 hours of deposition and requiring plaintiffs to respond to questions about and produce documents concerning plaintiff Andrew Justice¿s Worker¿s Compensation cases is granted. Defendants¿ request for sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to prepare an order. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 10:30am in Dept. 503, not 9:00am in Dept. 220. = (503/TLJ)
